name: demo_mcp
description: A minimal MCP-style server config that exposes local structured tools.

tools.name: lookup_release_note
tools.description: Return a mock release note for a named component.

component.description: Component or module name to inspect.

tools.response_template: Release note for {component}: this MCP demo tool is active and responding from config.

tools.name: summarize_incident_status
tools.description: Return a mock incident status summary for a given service and priority.

priority.description: Priority level such as P1 or P2.

tools.response_template: Incident summary for {service}: current priority is {priority}, owner acknowledged, next update in 30 minutes.
